response.original_title: PARADOX OF PRAXIS 5: SOMETIMES WE DREAM AS WE LIVE & SOMETIMES WE LIVE AS WE DREAM
response.overview: A striking performance film from the Mexico-based artist kicking a flaming soccer ball through the border city of Ciudad Juarez.
